title: Fast Workers
writer: John McDermott, Laurence Stallings, Herman J. Mankiewicz
actors: John Gilbert, Robert Armstrong, Mae Clarke
plot: Gunner and Bucker are pals who work as riveters. Whenever Bucker gets the urge to marry, which is often, Gunner will hit on his girl to see if she is true or not. So far, Gunner has not failed. But one night, while Gunner is in ja...
